channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mountour scores fastest OT goal in NHL history in Kraken's comeback win over Canadiens
item.description: Brandon Mountour had the fastest goal in NHL overtime history, scoring his second goal of the game four seconds into the extra period to give the Seattle Kraken a 5-4 comeback victory over Montreal on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bubble Watch: Ohio State's loss is North Carolina's gain, plus a good day for the SEC
item.description: A look at the NCAA Tournament bubble picture after Wednesday's games: O-H N-O It's still fairly early in the major conference tournaments, so for bubble teams, Wednesday was more about avoiding bad losses than earning significant wins.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: First pro boxer from Stanford shares journey on juggling fighting, academics
item.description: (KRON) -- Dante Kirkman is the first-ever professional boxer to come from Stanford. KRON4 spoke with Kirkman ahead of his March 8 fight against veteran Jose Cruz.
item.dc:creator: Erin Wilson, KRON4

item.title: The 49ers agree to a 2-year contract with QB Mac Jones, AP source says
item.description: Quarterback Mac Jones will finally join the San Francisco 49ers four years after the team nearly drafted him third overall.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Real Madrid beats Atletico on penalties in Champions League. Arsenal, Villa, Dortmund also advance
item.description: Real Madrid beat Atletico Madrid in a Champions League penalty shootout — again — to keep its title defense alive Wednesday and advance to the quarterfinals. Defender Antonio Rüdiger scored the decisive spot-kick in a 4-2 shootout win after two Atletico players missed.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Allen's personal and financial life set, Bills QB focuses on unfinished business
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — As blessed as Josh Allen considers himself following a year in which he was voted NFL MVP, got engaged to a Hollywood actor and became one of the league’s top-paid players, one item remains on the Buffalo Bills quarterback’s to-do list. Win a Super Bowl, of course.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rick Pitino wins 1st Big East Coach of the Year award and RJ Luis Jr. is Player of the Year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Add another accolade to Rick Pitino's incredible resume. This was a new one, too — which might come as a surprise. Pitino won his first Big East Coach of the Year award on Wednesday and RJ Luis Jr. took Player of the Year honors after they propelled a resurgent St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams release Cooper Kupp after failing to find trade partner
item.description: After eight seasons, one of which ended in a Triple Crown, the Los Angeles Rams announced Wednesday that they have released Cooper Kupp.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: West Virginia football coach says he's banning his players from dancing on TikTok
item.description: Rich Rodriguez isn't banning social media, but he is prohibiting the West Virginia football players from posting dancing videos to TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL players score a shot at Hollywood through hands-on training sessions with filmmaker Deon Taylor
item.description: Filmmaker Deon Taylor has built a pipeline for pro athletes to transition into a filmmaking post career with the Hidden Empire Sports Collective.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Landrum Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pacers' Tyrese Haliburton converts last-second 'football play' into 4 points to stun Bucks
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Tyrese Haliburton described it as “a football play” — and he converted the extra point, too.
item.dc:creator: MARK AMBROGI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Warriors' Steph Curry becomes investor in Unrivaled Basketball
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Stephen Curry has joined Unrivaled basketball as an investor. The Golden State Warriors guard is the latest sports star to join the 3v3 basketball league as an investor, joining the likes of the NBA's Giannis Antetokounmpo and Carmelo Anthony, and tennis star Coco Gauff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: The 49ers lose several key players on the opening day of free agency
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The opening of free agency for the San Francisco 49ers was more about their losses than their additions.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Christopher Bell holds off Denny Hamlin at Phoenix to win third straight NASCAR Cup Series race
item.description: Bell survived a late drag race with Hamlin to become the first NASCAR Cup Series driver to win three straight races in the NextGen car, edging his teammate by 0.049 seconds to win the second-closest race in Phoenix Raceway history on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history
item.description: Garrett, the 2023 AP Defensive Player of the Year, had asked for a trade last month but the Browns were adamant about keeping the 29-year-old star in Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kenwood Academy girls basketball team brings IHSA Class 4A state title back to South Side for 1st time in program history
item.description: NOTE: The attached video is from a feature story by GN Sports' Josh Frydman on the Kenwood Academy boys and girls basketball programs prior to the IHSA State Girls Basketball Tournament over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Valley clinches WAC regular season title
item.description: STEPHENVILLE, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Dominick Nelson matched a career high with 25 points, and Carter Welling added 18 as Utah Valley defeated Tarleton State 71-66 in a sold-out Wisdom Gym on Saturday night, closing out WAC play with a statement win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Trump will lead task force preparing for 2026 World Cup
item.description: President Donald Trump has created a task force to prepare for the 2026 World Cup, which will bring the globe's premier soccer tournament to North America at a time when his on-again, off-again tariffs have ratcheted up tensions across the continent.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kenwood girls and boys basketball squads looking to make school history together
item.description: The Kenwood Girls Basketball team defeated Alton 61-55 Friday afternoon at the IHSA Class 4A semifinal to advance to the school’s first state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Yanni Gourde back where he belongs, in Tampa Bay
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning organization believes that adding two elite forwards Yanni Gourde and Oliver Byorkstrand will be the push they need to make a deep playoff run.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC
